message:
fix: count cache tokens in ctx total

Anthropic splits input tokens into uncached (input_tokens) + cached
(cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens). Only counting input_tokens
gave tiny numbers (e.g. 77) on resumed sessions where most history
was cache-hit.

Fix: sum all three in both the TUI display and the context manager's
RecordInputTokens so pressure calculations and the snapshot's
LastInputTokens also reflect the true context size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
